meaning: n.僧侣所领之禄,圣俸,有俸圣职
examples: The church instituted the young man into a benefice.
The quality of service of the call centers affects directly the benefice of a company.
This kind of condition caused the East Asian country to be at the disadvantageous position in the international competition, so loses great free trade benefice.
Oscarey church was one of several in a combined benefice, the most distant being seventeen miles away.
He started sleeping in the church three weeks ago after two other churches in the benefice, at Rushbrooke and Beyton, had lead thefts.
